question:
Will Napoli vs. Como end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 1, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.legaseriea.it/

evidences.title: Coppa Italia: Napoli vs. Como – probable line-ups, where to watch on TV | OneFootball
evidences.content: Defender Giovanni Di Lorenzo is also injured, and Antonio Conte stated last week that the Italy international would be out of action for two months. According to reports, Amir Rrahmani, Juan Jesus and Sam Beukema will start in central defence for the Partenopei. Como are way more rested than Napoli as they didn’t play in Serie A this past weekend, making their last competitive outing on February 1. Fabregas is expected to pick his ideal Como XI with Anastosis Douvikas and Nico Paz in attack. The only doubt for the Azzurri seems to be on the right wing with either Mergim Vojvoda or Jayden Addai starting. The winner between Napoli and Como will meet Inter in the semi-finals. ### Napoli vs. Como – where to watch on TV [...] ## OneFootball Videos The Partenopei are short of options in attack and midfield, with Scott McTominay, Frank Zambo Anguissa, Kevin De Bruyne, David Neres, Matteo Politano and Billy Gilmour all injured. evidences.title: 2024–25 Serie A - Wikipedia
evidences.content: ## Teams [edit] Parma returned to the Serie A after three years, while Venezia returned after two. Como were promoted for the first time since the 2002–2003 season — bringing 21 consecutive years in the lower leagues to an end. Frosinone were relegated to the Serie B after just one year in the top league — ending what was only their third Serie A appearance in their 119-year history. Conversely, Sassuolo's longest stint in the Serie A since their founding in 1920 came to an end after 11 seasons. Salernitana were relegated after three years. ### Team changes [edit] | Promoted from 2023–24 Serie B | Relegated from 2023–24 Serie A | --- | | Parma | Frosinone | | Como | Sassuolo | | Venezia | Salernitana | 2024–25 Serie A is located in Italy Atalanta Atalanta Bologna Bologna [...] | Pos | Team v t e | Pld | W | D | L | GF | GA | GD | Pts | Qualification or relegation | --- --- --- --- --- | 1 | Napoli (C) | 38 | 24 | 10 | 4 | 59 | 27 | +32 | 82 | Qualification for the Champions League league phase | | 2 | Inter Milan | 38 | 24 | 9 | 5 | 79 | 35 | +44 | 81 | | 3 | Atalanta | 38 | 22 | 8 | 8 | 78 | 37 | +41 | 74 | | 4 | Juventus | 38 | 18 | 16 | 4 | 58 | 35 | +23 | 70 | | 5 | Roma | 3...

evidences.title: Serie A table, stats & results, Football Italy - BetExplorer.com
evidences.content: ### Times em Alta e em Baixa A Serie A é marcada pela competição ferrenha na busca pelo título e por vagas nas competições europeias, com muitas equipes conhecidas capazes de se classificar. Os times mais famosos da competição são, sem dúvida, Juventus, Milan e Inter, mas Napoli, Atalanta, Fiorentina e outros também devem ser considerados. As quatro equipes mais bem colocadas ao final da competições se classificam automaticamente para a fase de liga da Liga de Campeões para a temporada seguinte, ao passo que a 5ª colocada se qualifica para a Liga Europa e a 6ª conquista um lugar na Liga Conferência. Em termos de rebaixamento, os times na 18ª, 19ª e 20ª posições são rebaixados para a Serie B. ## Calendário de Jogos da Serie A em 2024/25 [...] Classificação Classificações Forma Acima/Abaixo HT/FT Total Casa Fora Total Casa Fora Total Casa Fora Total Casa Fora Resultados Nenhuma partida encontrada Mostrar todos os resultados Confronto direto | | | O serviço de odds para apostas é fornecido em colaboração com OddsPortal.com | # Tabela, Próximos Jogos, Estatísticas e Odds da Serie A Reunindo em um só lugar todas as estatísticas e dados da Serie A que você poderia desejar como fã ou a...

evidences.title: Medium
evidences.content: Thankfully, you can get a bit of a headstart on your planning as Serie A have confirmed the dates when matchdays will have their dates and times confirmed. These dates can be found below and here. Matchday 1 to 3 — confirmed 30th June 2025 Matchday 4 to 12 — confirmed 5th September 2025 Matchday 13 to 22 — confirmed 10th October 2025 Matchday 23 to 24 — confirmed 19th December 2025 Matchday 25 to 27 — confirmed 30th January 2026 Matchday 28 to 30 — confirmed 27th February 2026 Matchday 31 to 33 — confirmed 20th March 2026 Matchday 34 to 36 — confirmed 17th April 2026 Matchday 37 — confirmed 11th May 2026 Matchday 38 — confirmed 18th May 2026 [...] One crucial aspect to note is the ticket release schedule. For the larger, more popular teams in Serie A (like Juventus, Inter Milan, AC Milan, Roma, and Napoli), tickets often go on sale several weeks in advance, sometimes even before the exact kick-off times are finalised. This is particularly important if you’re hoping to snag cheaper tickets (we bagged both Inter and Juventus tickets for €25) or those in or near to the “ultras” section, as these tend to sell out quickly. Como and Venezia also have very small grounds, meaning ticket...

Games against Inter and Arsenal, the latter away, will need them to both play superbly and have their full squad fit, with neither being the case for that opening defeat at Liverpool.
